stories.title: Torres fires Spain past Argentina for 2nd WC title
stories.summary: Ferran Torres clinched Spain's second men's World Cup title with an extra-time winner against reigning world champions Argentina in a bad-tempered final.

stories.title: Spain's persistence pays off to win 2026 World Cup...
stories.summary: So that's it! The 2026 World Cup is over and Spain have been crowned champions. Here's how they won it, how Argentina lost it, and everything in-between.

stories.title: Player ratings: Lionel Messi 3/10 as Spain beat Ar...
stories.summary: Lionel Messi had little impact as Argentina barely approached Spain's goal in a one-sided World Cup final.

stories.title: Fox birdies difficult 18th to pass Young, win Open...
stories.summary: Ryan Fox birdied four of the final six holes at Royal Birkdale, including the difficult 18th hole, to win the Open Championship by one stroke over Cameron Young.

stories.title: Cards exec to appeal gambling policy suspension
stories.summary: Cardinals personnel executive Ryan Gold is appealing an indefinite suspension for violating the NFL's gambling policy, his attorney said.
